channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Putin is running out of money to wage war on Ukraine, and this Russian-occupied territory is running out of fuel as Kyiv smashes supply lines
item.description: Russia faces high casualties, declining recruitment, and attacks on areas far from the frontlines.

item.title: Jamie Dimon called Elon Musk the 'Edison of our time' as JPMorgan hosted SpaceX's $75 billion IPO roadshow—and even invited Musk's mom
item.description: Top bankers are praising Musk ahead of his rocket company's record-setting listing.

item.title: Trump says Knicks owner James Dolan invited him to Game 3 of the NBA Finals and he's going
item.description: Trump said he was considering Game 3 but did not rule out Game 4, adding, 'Maybe I'll do both.'

item.title: AI productivity gains are real, but poor management remains a challenge
item.description: BCG's David Martin told Fortune that fear hinders collaboration. "A sharing culture is vital, but fearful employees struggle with it."
